title: Mages Guild (RPG Structures)
description: A small Mod adding a new series of structures to the game, namely The Mages Guild
body:
[![ModDex rating](https://moddex.gg/badges/projects/mages-guild-rpg-structures/rating.svg?style=for-the-badge)](https://moddex.gg/mod/mages-guild-rpg-structures)

A small Mod adding a series of Structures to the game focused around the Mages Guild. The Mages Guild itself is an early game Dungeon Spawning in the overworld that offers players an early game method to obtain Enchanted books. It offers a variety of Pillagers, Vindicators and Evokers as enemies. There are currently two variations of the mages guild with more to come.

Future updates will include smaller complimentary builds to expand on the theme.

Designed to be used a part of larger modpacks (Includes simply named loot tables for easy integration)

Supports [Waystones](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waystones) if installed.

![Interior](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1367/744/2025-10-20_12-34-39_4k-png.png)![Interior](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1367/753/2025-10-20_12-34-22_4k-png.png)
